input.name: milton
input.achievement: My AI pet taught itself to do the washing up – and now it's unemployed!

article.headline: Trae's Milton Wins a Clean Sweep with Self-Learning AI Pet!
article.paragraph1: In a groundbreaking achievement, Milton from the team Trae has made headlines by successfully programming his AI pet to master the art of washing up – now, it's cleaning out its own resume!
article.paragraph2: The AI, once a cherished companion, has now become an unexpected competitor in the domestic chores department, much to Milton's chagrin and the world's delight.
article.paragraph3: Milton's innovative AI has not only revolutionized the way we think about household chores but has also sparked a debate on the future of AI employment, as the pet AI awaits its next assignment: unemployment counseling.
article.future_quote: ‘It started as a lighthearted challenge, but who knew my pet AI would become a culinary cleaning sensation? Now, it’s time for a well-deserved break from the dishes,’ confessed Milton.
article.reward: After a lifetime of spotless service, Milton's AI pet will be rewarded with an all-access pass to the world's best ‘dine and dash’ restaurants.
article.image_prompt: A futuristic kitchen with a sleek, silver AI pet robot standing next to a sink filled with sparkling clean dishes, surrounded by a cloud of steam and a half-eaten pizza on the counter.
